title: Small Business
description: Small businesses drive the economy and exemplify the innovative spirit that is the hallmark of our culture. DARPA partners with small businesses to develop and commercialize breakthrough technologies in service of national security.
text:
Small businesses drive the economy and exemplify the innovative spirit that is the hallmark of our culture. We partner with small businesses to develop and commercialize breakthrough technologies in service of national security.
Our opportunities are open to all eligible performers â from start-ups to larger firms.
To ensure access for small business, we offer specialized support and manage topics under the Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) and Small Business Technology Transfer (STTR) programs.
New to DARPA?
No matter where you are in your journey with us, DARPAConnect is a valuable resource. Get access to a comprehensive curriculum, proposal support, mentoring, and one-on-one coaching.
Go to DARPAConnect
Our Commitment to Small Businesses
Our Small Business Programs Office (SBPO) enables the small business community to create and transition radical, game-changing technologies that benefit national security, the federal government, and the commercial marketplace.
What Success Looks Like
We empower small businesses to transform research into viable products, secure funding, and contribute to economic growth.
Microbially Induced Calcium Carbonate Precipitation (MICP)
BioSqueeze, Inc.
Fueling success across the country
Through successful SBIR/STTR projects, small businesses bring innovative solutions to market, enhance competition, and drive technological advancement. | See all success stories
